resources.string: Symptoms felt in the last week
Easily tired and lack of energy
How high is your stress level right now?
You are in good condition. Keep the balance!
You are showing signs of burnout. Try to get more rest.
Your burnout level is quite high. Take time for recovery immediately.
• Continue your good habits\n• Maintain sleep patterns\n• Make time for hobbies
• Reduce night screen time\n• Try 4-7-8 breathing technique\n• Talk to friends or family
• Take a break from work/studies\n• Do light physical activity\n• Consider professional counseling

BurnoutGuard

My Burnout Score: %1$d / 100 (%2$s)

%3$s

Check yours on BurnoutGuard!

BurnoutGuard is a simple app to help detect burnout levels.

Created for assessment task.

Burnout is a state of physical, emotional, and mental exhaustion caused by prolonged stress.

© 2026 BurnoutGuard
